---
title: "William John Gibson"
---

## William John Gibson

**Dates:** (b. Peshawur 1853)

### Description

clerk

### Biography

He married (1883) Emmeline Spratt.  He was a clerk in a City of London warehouse in the 1881 census.  He may or may not be the dissenting ‘clerk and of a station rather above, much given to good works’ to whom she was engaged in 1878.

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 22d 1878[[footnote:1]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
